chapter_title.ar: باب الرُّكُوعِ وَ مَا يُقَالُ فِيهِ مِنَ التَّسْبِيحِ وَ الدُّعَاءِ فِيهِ وَ إِذَا رَفَعَ الرَّأْسَ مِنْهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 24 – The Rukū and what is said during it from the Glorification, and the supplication during it, and when the head is raised from it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/124)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/124)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَقُلْتُ مَا يَقُولُ الرَّجُلُ خَلْفَ الْإِمَامِ إِذَا قَالَ سَمِعَ اللَّهُ لِمَنْ حَمِدَهُ قَالَ يَقُولُ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ وَ يَخْفِضُ مِنْ صَوْتِهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin ShAzān, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, fom Jameel Bin Darraj who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, so I said, ‘What should the man be saying behind the prayer leader when he says, ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Hears the one who praises Him<sup>azwj</sup>’?. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He should be saying, ‘The Praise is for Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, Lord<sup>azwj</sup> of the worlds’, and he should lower his voice’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Jamil ibn Darraj who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about what one says when performing behind an Imam when he says, ‘Allah hears all those who praise him.’ He (the Imam) said that he must say, ‘All praise belong to Allah, Cherisher of the worlds’ and lowers his voice.’”
